## 2023-01-02 - Day 1: Profile planning start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Harshit Paunikar should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to list the skills, projects, and links that should appear in the Harshit Paunikar profile so the project had a decent base. I was still mostly figuring out the shape of it, so a lot of the day went into small notes and half clear ideas. This looked simple on paper, but getting the tone right took a bit of back and forth.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had one-page content outline written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. It was not super polished, just stable enough that I felt okay moving forward.
